heading: Tracking of benefits
label: 7997 Tracking of benefits
text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary shall establish procedures to track the benefits provided, directly or indirectly, to individuals and entities under titles I and II and the amendments made by those titles.May 13, 2002
notes: References in TextTitles I and II, referred to in text, mean titles I and II of , , . For complete classification of titles I and II of to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 107–171116 Stat. 143Pub. L. 107–171May 13, 2002
amendments: References in TextTitles I and II, referred to in text, mean titles I and II of , , . For complete classification of titles I and II of to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 107–171116 Stat. 143Pub. L. 107–171May 13, 2002
